---
title: "Handouts"
---

* [Session 1: EDA](EDA_T.qmd)
* [Session 1: Introduction to R](introduction-to-r.qmd)
* [Session 2: Sample Mean](SampleMean_T.qmd)
* [Session 4: Inference on Mean](InferenceMean.qmd)
* [Session 5: Introduction SLR](IntroductionSLR_T.qmd)
* [Session 5: Interpretation SLR](Interpretation1_T.qmd)
* [Session 6: Multiple Linear Regression (I)](MLR2_T.qmd)
